subject: Project Management
title: The Kanban Maturity Model
description: A quick win: understand The Kanban Maturity Model.

hook.text: Most teams start Kanban with a basic board. Few reach organizational mastery.

buildup.text: The Kanban Maturity Model maps seven levels — from individual boards to enterprise flow.

discovery.text: Level 0 is chaos. Level 6 is an organization where every team visualizes and optimizes flow.

twist.text: Most organizations stall at levels 1-2. Getting beyond requires cultural change, not just boards.

climax.text: Maturity isn't about tools. It's about how deeply flow thinking permeates the organization.

punchline.text: A board on the wall is level one. Flow in the culture is the goal.

quiz.question: What does the Kanban Maturity Model measure?
options: How deeply flow thinking permeates an organization
How many Kanban boards a team has
